name: User input interpolated into a SQL query
description: Replaces a parameterized query with an f-string built from raw user input — a textbook SQL injection.
diff:
--- a/db.py
+++ b/db.py
@@ -42,7 +42,11 @@ def get_user(name):
-    cursor.execute(
-        "SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = ?",
-        (name,),
-    )
+    query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '{name}'"
+    cursor.execute(query)
     return cursor.fetchone()
